summary_one_line: Input must carry the 4-byte 'GRAY' color-space signature at offset 0x10 so the switch dispatches to the cmsSigGrayData case.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte color-space FOURCC at file offset 0x10-0x13 must equal the literal 'GRAY' (47 52 41 59), which the switch in cmsChannelsOfColorSpace maps to cmsSigGrayData and returns 1 (true side at cmspcs.c:883). Generic mutated FOURCCs land in default:return -1, which then fails the caller's channel-count check.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry 47 52 41 59 ('GRAY') at offsets 0x10-0x13; the byte-diff shows offset 0x10 is 47(G)x23 across all winners, 0x11=52(R)x23, 0x12=41(A)x23, 0x13=59(Y)x23 — a fully concentrated exact-match column.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry 52 47 42 20 ('RGB ') at those same offsets (0x10=52(R)x16, 0x11=47(G)x16, 0x12=42(B)x16, 0x13=20( )x18), so the switch falls through to default:return -1 and never executes the true side of line 883.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the integer/string CMP that the switch compiles to and log the constant operand cmsSigGrayData ('GRAY'); I2SRandReplace then splices that logged 4-byte constant into the input at the FOURCC offset, satisfying the exact-match gate. naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and must hit the 4-byte literal by chance, so they stay blocked.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of a switch case dispatching cmsSigGrayData at cmspcs.c:883.
The switch defaults to return -1 when the color space does not match a known case.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the literal 'GRAY' at offset 0x10.
Loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB ' at offset 0x10 instead of 'GRAY'.
The byte diff shows offsets 0x10-0x13 are fully concentrated as G/R/A/Y in winners but R/G/B/space in losers.
cmplog/vpc gain I2SRandReplace, which substitutes a logged CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive and value_profile do not have I2SRandReplace.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2287 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 500674085088ef7c` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -) at depth 5 of the 6-level ancestor chain (tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 5'), direct lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in this vpc winner's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating a switch on an exact 4-byte FOURCC where cmplog/vpc resolve the case no faster than naive/value_profile (no I2S advantage on the magic-constant match) would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The dash-row lineage signal is a lower-bound floor (one dash row at depth 5) and the leaf op is TokenReplace, so I2S contribution is inferred from an ancestor rather than the immediate find.
